name: Use of Password System for Primary Authentication
description: The product relies on passwords as the primary authentication mechanism, which is subject to numerous practical weaknesses including brute force, credential stuffing, phishing, and poor user password hygiene. Password-only systems are insufficient for security-critical applications.
detection_pattern: Look for AUTH nodes (primary authentication) that rely solely on INGRESS password data without additional CONTROL or AUTH mediators (multi-factor verification, rate limiting, adaptive authentication) to strengthen the authentication beyond simple password comparison.
